ogTitle: Elanora Heights vs Elcombe: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Elanora Heights and Elcombe.
heading: Elanora Heights vs Elcombe — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Elanora Heights, New South Wales and Elcombe, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Elcombe has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Elanora Heights (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Elanora Heights or Elcombe safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Elanora Heights has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Elcombe scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Elanora Heights scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Elcombe scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Elanora Heights or Elcombe?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Elcombe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
